positive: A symmetrical, intricate mandala pattern composed of geometric shapes, celestial bodies, and stylized floral elements. The color palette is limited to burnt orange, teal, and cream. Vector art style, perfect symmetry, Zentangle influence, designed for print repeat.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, messy, grunge
